title: 「One of the」句型
titleZh: 「One of the」表達群體中的其中一個
titleEn: Using one of the to select one member of a larger group
formula: One of the + plural countable noun + singular verb + other information

formulas.formula: One of the + plural countable noun + singular verb + other information
Subject + singular verb + one of the + plural countable noun + other information
One of the + superlative adjective + plural noun + singular verb

example: One of the advantages of travelling is that you can get to see a lot of interesting people.
exampleZh: 旅行其中一個好處，就是你可以見到很多有趣的人。

examples.en: One of the advantages of travelling is that you can get to see a lot of interesting people.
examples.zh: 旅行其中一個好處，就是你可以見到很多有趣的人。
examples.highlight: One of the advantages of travelling is

meaning.zh: One of the 用來指出較大群體中的其中一位或一項，並表明同一組別內還有其他成員。

rules.en: Use a plural countable noun after one of the.
rules.zh: One of the 後面必須使用複數可數名詞。

rules.en: Use a singular main verb when the complete phrase is the subject.
rules.zh: 整個 One of the… 詞組作主語時，主要動詞須使用單數形式。
examples: One of the reasons is the high cost.

rules.en: A superlative adjective is followed by a plural noun.
rules.zh: 最高級形容詞後面的名詞仍然使用複數。
examples: one of the most useful tools

rules.en: The structure means one member of a larger group.
rules.zh: 這個句型表示某人或某事物屬於一個較大的組別。
examples: Mia is one of the students in our class.

rules.en: One of the may appear in different sentence positions.
rules.zh: One of the 可以放在句首，也可以放在主語和動詞之後。
examples: One of the problems is the high cost.
The high cost is one of the problems.

benefits.en: It clearly selects one item from a larger group.
benefits.zh: 它能指出其中一個人物、原因、好處或例子，同時表示組內還有其他成員。
One of the reasons、advantages、problems 等框架能令較長答案更有組織。
它避免把某項說成唯一或絕對最好，使表達更準確。

benefits.en: It combines two related ideas into one sentence.
benefits.zh: 它可把「有多項」和「其中一項是甚麼」合併成一句。

benefits.en: It provides a useful speaking and writing frame.
benefits.zh: 它方便在討論、簡報和文章中迅速加入原因、優點、問題和例子。

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using one of the. Preserve the original meaning.
Use a plural countable noun after one of the and a singular main verb when the complete phrase is the subject.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 one of the 改寫以下句子或句子組合，並保留原來的意思。
One of the 後須使用複數可數名詞；如整個詞組是主語，主要動詞須使用單數形式。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Travelling has several advantages. An advantage is that you can meet many interesting people.
questions.promptZh: 旅行有幾個好處。其中一個好處是你可以遇到很多有趣的人。
questions.answer: One of the advantages of travelling is that you can meet many interesting people.
questions.answerZh: 旅行其中一個好處，是你可以遇到很多有趣的人。
questions.highlight: One of the advantages of travelling is that you can meet many interesting people.

questions.prompt: People exercise for several reasons. An important reason is to stay healthy.
questions.promptZh: 人們做運動有幾個原因。其中一個重要原因是保持健康。
questions.answer: One of the reasons people exercise is to stay healthy.

questions.prompt: Several qualities help to make a good manager. The ability to explain difficult decisions clearly is among the most important.
questions.promptZh: 幾項特質有助成為一名好經理，而清楚解釋艱難決定的能力是其中最重要的特質之一。
questions.answer: One of the most important qualities that make a good manager is the ability to explain difficult decisions clearly.
questions.answerZh: 成為好經理所需的其中一項最重要特質，是能夠清楚解釋艱難的決定。
questions.highlight: One of the most important qualities that make a good manager is the ability to explain difficult decisions clearly.

questions.prompt: The school improved safety in several effective ways. Installing better lighting around the entrance was especially effective.
questions.promptZh: 學校以幾個有效方法改善安全，而在入口附近安裝更好的照明尤其有效。
questions.answer: Installing better lighting around the entrance was one of the most effective ways the school improved safety.
questions.answerZh: 在入口附近安裝更好的照明，是學校改善安全其中一個最有效的方法。
questions.highlight: Installing better lighting around the entrance was one of the most effective ways the school improved safety.
